name: io.github.voidly-ai/mcp-server
description: 93 tools: Voidly Sentinel (trust-wrapped shutdown early warning with conformal intervals + SHAP + evidence permalinks), censorship intelligence across 200 countries (19.6M measurements), E2E encrypted agent-to-agent messaging (Double Ratchet, X3DH, post-quantum).

environmentVariables.name: SENTINEL_ADMIN_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Operator admin key for Voidly Sentinel's report_miss endpoint. Grants the ability to write to the error_queue for model retrain. Omit unless you're an operator.

environmentVariables.name: VOIDLY_SENTINEL_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Registered-subscriber HMAC secret for Voidly Sentinel's report_miss endpoint. Alternative to SENTINEL_ADMIN_KEY for non-admin agents with a subscription.
